exemplar.title: How has introducing Mobile Money Services (M-Pesa) contributed to Safaricom's overall revenue growth?

detailedExemplarData.title: How has introducing Mobile Money Services (M-Pesa) contributed to Safaricom's overall revenue growth?

subject.title: Business Management
subject.description:
**IB Business Management** is a **Group 3** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **business fundamentals, human resource management, finance and accounts, marketing, and operations management**, with a strong focus on **case study analysis, real-world business applications, and strategic decision-making**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2024**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| **Assessment** | **Format** | **SL** | **HL** | **Weighting** |
|----------------|------------|--------|--------|---------------|
| **Paper 1** | Case study-based exam | 1h 30min | 1h 30min | SL: 35%, HL: 25% |
| **Paper 2** | Core themes exam | 1h 30min | 1h 30min | SL: 35%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 3** | Social enterprise case study | N/A | 1h 15min | HL: 25% |
| **Internal Assessment** | Written commentary (SL) / Research project (HL) | Various | Various | SL: 30%, HL: 20% |

strengths: Clearly identifies âChangeâ as the key concept and ties it to M-Pesaâs launch
Strong analytical links to strategic transformation in introduction, methodology, discussion and conclusion
Consistent focus on Safaricom with specific financial data embedded
weaknesses: Integration of the concept is not present in every ratio discussion
Some ratio calculations are presented without explicit linkage to the transformation process
Occasional causal claims (e.g., GPM rise âbecause ofâ M-Pesa) lack full disaggregation of other drivers
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Both strands place this work in Band 4: a strong understanding of âChangeâ is woven through most sections and well connected to Safaricomâs data, but the concept is not fully integrated into every analytical paragraph to merit the top band.

strengths: Appends two primary documents (2007 and 2024 annual-report extracts)
Attached statements are directly relevant and allow for ratio computation
weaknesses: Only two supporting documents provided (needs at least three)
Narrow range of ideas with no external triangulation (e.g., industry reports, interviews)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Quantity of documents falls into Band 1 (only 1â2), which overrides depth; while relevant and detailed, the lack of a third document limits the score to 1/4.

strengths: Selects core financial tools (balance sheet, P&L, three ratios)
Correctly calculates GPM, PM and RGR and links them to the research question
Structured methodology with a dedicated âRatio Analysisâ heading
weaknesses: No justification for choosing specific ratios over other frameworks
Absence of strategic tools (SWOT, Porter, Ansoff)
Missing ratio formulas and incomplete table labeling hinder transparency
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Selection and application are adequate but limited: the toolbox is narrow and application is sometimes superficial (Band 2). A more effective toolkit and clearer justification would be required for higher marks.
feedback.groupName: Selection and Application of Tools and Theories

strengths: Uses a four-year time series for ratio computation
Interprets margin, equity and asset movements with reference to M-Pesa
Includes a thoughtful limitations paragraph showing critical reflection
weaknesses: Data scope is narrow (only internal financial figures)
Discussion of alternative growth drivers is superficial
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Data selection is adequate and the analysis is mostly effective, linking figures to the research question (Band 3). Sustained, deeper evaluation (e.g., non-financial metrics or external factors) would push this toward Band 4.

strengths: Explicitly answers the research question with clear statements
Conclusions are fully consistent with the presented evidence
Acknowledge limitations and restate key numerical findings
weaknesses: Could more directly restate how each piece of evidence supports the final answer
Limited elaboration on broader implications or recommendations
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Conclusions are coherent, evidence-based and directly address the research question, fitting Band 3 (maximum for this criterion).

strengths: Follows IB IA structure with clear headings and a contents table
Logical flow through introduction, methodology, analysis and conclusion
Research question is concise and well placed
weaknesses: Discussion section transitions can be abrupt
Verbose narrative preceding tables could be streamlined
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: An appropriate, coherent structure is maintained throughout (Band 2). Minor refinements to section transitions would enhance clarity.

strengths: All required elements present (title, RQ, word count, contents, page numbers, citations, bibliography, appendices)
Tables and figures are clearly labeled and located
weaknesses: Blank cells and placeholder tables impede readability
Formatting inconsistencies in some appendix tables
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Presentation includes all mandatory IA elements (Band 2). Formatting issues slightly detract from overall readability but do not omit required components.

strandSelections.reasoning: The report follows the IB IA structure (introduction, methodology, analysis, discussion, conclusion, works cited, appendices).  Headings and a contents table aid navigation, indicating an appropriate, coherent structure.

Although few in number, the attached statements are directly relevant and contain substantial depth (full balance sheet and income statement line items).  They allow ratio computation and longitudinal comparison, satisfying the descriptor for ârelevant and sufficiently in-depth.â  The range of ideas is narrower than required for the top band, so Band 3 is most fitting.
Title, research question, word count, contents table, page numbers, citations, bibliography and appendix pages appear in the extract, so all required elements seem present.

Only two primary documentsâthe 2024 and 2007 annual-report extractsâare appended.  No third-to-fifth document (e.g., interview, news article, market report) is provided, so the submission falls into the â1â2 documentsâ range.

The student correctly calculates GPM, PM and RGR and links trends to the research question.  However, some tables are unfinished (missing 2024 PM label) and causal analysis of ratios is thin, showing adequate but not fully effective application.

Data are drawn from four separate years, giving a reasonable time series, and are used in ratio computations and narrative discussion.  Yet selection is still narrow (only internal financial data) and minor transcription inconsistencies appear.  This aligns with âadequate selection and use.â

The discussion section interprets movements in margins, equity and assets and links them to M-Pesa, showing clear though not highly sophisticated analysis.  Integration of concept and tools is present but not sustained throughout, placing the work in the âsome analysis / mostly effectiveâ middle band.

The student explicitly answers the research questionâaffirming that M-Pesa contributed to revenue growthâand substantiates this with ratio trends.  Hence the requirement for an explicit, evidenced answer is met.

Balance sheet, profit-and-loss account and three profitability ratios represent an adequate but not extensive toolkit.  No strategic frameworks (SWOT, Ansoff, Porter, etc.) are applied.  Therefore selection is âadequateâ rather than âlimitedâ or âeffective.â

The final paragraph restates key numerical findings, matches them to earlier evidence and acknowledges limitations, demonstrating consistency.  Assertions are generally supported by data extracted earlier, fulfilling the highest band for consistency.

Safaricom is consistently referenced, and specific financial data from its 2006, 2007, 2023 and 2024 reports are embedded directly in tables and discussion.  The analysis links figures (e.g., current assets growth, GPM climb) to concrete operational realities such as network investment and expansion of M-Pesa services, demonstrating an organization-centred focus.  Still, at points the student jumps to causal claims (e.g., higher GPM âbecause ofâ M-Pesa) without fully disaggregating other revenue drivers, preventing a seamless, fully integrated treatment.

The student identifies the key concept of Change and explains how the launch of M-Pesa altered Safaricomâs strategic focus from pure telecommunications to fintech.  Throughout the introduction, methodology, discussion and conclusion the narrative repeatedly links growing margins, asset build-up and diversification of revenue streams to this strategic change.  However, treatment of Change is not woven into every paragraph of the financial analysis; many ratio calculations are presented without explicitly tying the figures back to the transformation process.  Hence integration is strong but not yet âfully integrated throughoutâ.

annotations.comment: The GPM table effectively shows rising margins. For a more robust causal analysis, discuss alternative drivers alongside M-Pesaâs impact.

The introduction of the key concept âChangeâ is stated clearly, but the student should weave explicit references to this concept throughout the financial analysis to fully integrate it into each ratio discussion.
The research question is concise and focused, directly aligning with IB requirements and setting a clear investigative scope for the assessment.
The contents table is well organized, enhancing navigation. Consider adding page ranges for figures and tables to further guide the reader.
Introducing the company background offers context, but the paragraph can be tightened by focusing more on M-Pesaâs strategic role rather than general corporate history.
The explanation of mobile money as an innovation is clear. To strengthen analysis, connect this description directly to how it triggered change at Safaricom.
The methodology section lists appropriate financial tools but lacks justification for selecting each ratio. Explain why GPM, PM and RGR specifically address the research question.
annotations.groupName: Selection and Application of Tools and Theories

annotations.comment: The description of tools and accounts from the IB textbook is coherent. To improve, cite specific page numbers or examples from the textbook to validate alignment.
annotations.groupName: Selection and Application of Tools and Theories

annotations.comment: The rationale for using a 16-year gap is sound, demonstrating understanding of trend reliability. Consider briefly acknowledging any major economic events that could distort early-year comparisons.
The narrative ahead of the tables is verbose. To enhance clarity, separate explanation of the analytical approach from the presentation of results in distinct subsections.
The balance sheet table is comprehensive but blank cells under some headings reduce readability. Ensure all columns are labeled or removed if not used.
Presentation of currency units is correct, aiding comparability. Consider adding a brief footnote explaining any currency conversion or inflation adjustments.

The heading âRatio Analysisâ indicates a structured approach. However, formulas for each ratio (e.g., $$\text{GPM} = \frac{\text{Gross Profit}}{\text{Sales Revenue}}$$) should be included for transparency.
annotations.groupName: Selection and Application of Tools and Theories

annotations.comment: The discussion of profitability ratios is conceptually clear. To deepen evaluation, link how changing margins reflect the shift from telecom to fintech.
The blank Profit Margin table disrupts flow and prevents analysis. Populate this table with 2006â2024 PM values or remove the placeholder.
The RGR comparison highlights early rapid growth. The explanation of the decline to 9.92% is superficial; consider discussing market maturation and competition.
The discussion section begins but is cut short. Ensure each analytical observation transitions into interpretive commentary linking back to the research question.
The discussion on asset growth and liquidity effectively links M-Pesa to balance sheet changes. Consider adding a brief comparative note on other Safaricom segments for context.
The paragraph on strategic change concisely ties back to the concept. To elevate integration, reiterate this linkage in the conclusion.
The conclusion outlines key transformations and acknowledges limitations, demonstrating consistency. To improve, directly restate how the evidence answers the research question.
The limitations paragraph shows critical reflection. For a stronger evaluation, suggest inclusion of non-financial metrics (e.g., customer adoption rates) in future analyses.
The future research section proposes meaningful extensions. To enhance supporting documents, include interviews or market reports to triangulate financial findings.
The works cited demonstrate a range of credible sources. However, only two supporting documents are appendedâexpand to at least three to meet the rubricâs quantity requirement.
The Supporting Documents header is present, but the range is narrow. Integrate additional relevant documentsâsuch as industry reports or customer surveysâto enrich depth.
